mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM festival f JOIN place p ON f.festival_id = p.place_id WHERE ( 6371 * acos( cos(#{lat} * 3.14159 / 180) * cos(p.latitude * 3.14159 / 180) * cos((p.longitude * 3.14159 / 180)-(#{lng} * 3.14159 / 180))+ sin(#{lat} * 3.14159 / 180) * sin(p.latitude * 3.14159 / 180) ) ) <= #{radius} AND f.status != 'ENDED'
AND ( SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(rating),1),0) FROM review WHERE place_id = p.place_id AND status = 'display' ) >= #{minRating}
AND (p.name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND p.address LIKE '%' || #{province} || '%'
AND p.address LIKE '%' || #{district} || '%'

SELECT p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, p.view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at AS placeRegDate, COUNT(r.review_id) AS review_count, NVL(ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1), 0) AS avg_rating FROM place p LEFT JOIN review r ON p.place_id = r.place_id AND r.status = 'DISPLAY' WHERE p.place_id = #{value} AND p.place_type = 'FEST' GROUP BY p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, p.view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at
SELECT festival_id, description, start_date, end_date, status FROM FESTIVAL WHERE festival_id = #{festival_id}
SELECT ticket_id, festival_id, ticket_type, price, stock, description FROM FESTIVAL_TICKET WHERE festival_id = #{festival_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE place SET view_count = NVL(view_count, 0) + 1 WHERE place_id = #{value} AND place_type = 'FEST'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.review_id, r.user_id, r.place_id, r.rating, r.content, r.status, r.created_at AS reviewDate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY r.created_at DESC) AS rn FROM review r WHERE r.place_id = #{placeId} AND r.status = 'DISPLAY' ) WHERE rn > #{offset} AND rn <= (#{offset} + #{limit})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE place_id = #{value} AND status = 'DISPLAY'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite ( favorite_id, user_id, place_id, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_FAVORITE.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{placeId}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM FESTIVAL WHERE status != 'ENDED' AND festival_id > 983 -- 가짜 축제 데이터 랭킹에 안 나오게 처리

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, p.view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at, f.festival_id, f.description, f.start_date, f.end_date, f.status, NVL(r.avg_rating, 0) AS avg_rating, NVL(r.review_count, 0) AS review_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NVL(r.avg_rating, 0) DESC) AS rn FROM PLACE p JOIN FESTIVAL f ON p.place_id = f.festival_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT place_id, ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) AS avg_rating, COUNT(review_id) AS review_count FROM REVIEW WHERE status = 'DISPLAY' GROUP BY place_id ) r ON p.place_id = r.place_id WHERE p.place_type = 'FEST' AND f.status != 'ENDED' AND p.place_id > 983 -- 가짜 축제 데이터 랭킹에 안 나오게 처리 ) WHERE rn > #{start, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND rn <= #{end, jdbcType=INTEGER} -- start 초과 ~ end 이하 구간만 조회

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, p.view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at, f.festival_id, f.description, f.start_date, f.end_date, f.status, NVL(r.avg_rating, 0) AS avg_rating, NVL(r.review_count, 0) AS review_count FROM PLACE p JOIN FESTIVAL f ON p.place_id = f.festival_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT place_id, ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) AS avg_rating, COUNT(review_id) AS review_count FROM REVIEW WHERE status = 'DISPLAY' GROUP BY place_id ) r ON p.place_id = r.place_id WHERE p.place_type = 'FEST' AND f.status != 'ENDED' AND p.place_id > 983 -- 가짜 축제 데이터 랭킹에 안 나오게 처리 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
